requestor_company_name.description: Caller employer or organization when explicitly stated. Do not use the service provider's name or the company being called.

requestor_first_name.description: Caller first name from self-introduction. Keep one canonical spelling and return null if not provided.

requestor_last_name.description: Caller last name from self-introduction. Include compound surnames when stated and return null if not provided.

contact_first_name.description: Follow-up contact first name. Defaults to requestor_first_name unless the caller explicitly names another contact.

contact_last_name.description: Follow-up contact last name. Defaults to requestor_last_name unless the caller explicitly names another contact.

contact_phone_number.description: Final confirmed callback number in E.164 format. Return null if fewer than 10 US digits are provided or the number is unclear.

contact_preferred_followup_channel.description: Preferred follow-up channel: phone, sms, or email. Default to phone when unclear.

contact_preferred_followup_time.description: Caller-stated follow-up timing preference, recorded in the caller's words. Return null if unstated.

requested_service_address.description: Physical destination for onsite work. Do not use for branch selection, pickup, billing, sales, or general information calls.

requestor_is_contact.description: True unless the caller explicitly designates another follow-up contact.

existing_request.description: True only when the caller references an existing ticket, case, request number, or follow-up. Default false.

request_affected_asset.description: Specific equipment, asset ID, software, vehicle, system, or device mentioned by the caller. Return null for generic references.

request_deadline.description: Caller-stated deadline or timeframe for completion or follow-up. Return null if unstated.

request_description.description: One factual paragraph summarizing the request using only stated facts. Do not add promises, greetings, or invented context.

request_summary.description: Short ticket title under 80 characters, preferably '[equipment or need] - [location]'. Avoid vague words like issue or problem.

conversation_transfer_destination.description: Destination label if a live transfer actually occurred. Return null when no transfer occurred.

conversation_transfer_reason.description: Brief reason for an actual transfer, based on caller statements or configured routing. Return null when no transfer occurred.

conversation_transferred.description: True only when a transfer tool or verified transfer action occurred. Do not infer from future callback promises.

requestor_requested_specific_person.description: Specific person requested by name. Return null for generic department or role requests.

routing_department.description: Best matching department label: Service, Field Service, Sales, Marketing, Purchasing, Fulfillment, Shipping, Billing, Finance, Accounting, HR, Payroll, IT, IT Support, Operations, Contracts, Administration, or General.

routing_site_location.description: Branch or organizational site for routing. This may differ from the onsite service address.

routing_urgency.description: One of emergency, soon, routine, or estimate. Default to routine when unclear.
